reasoning: The control 'Security Monitoring' focuses on enabling security monitoring and logging capabilities, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through audit logging and network flow logging. Kubernetes audit logging can be configured to capture API server activities, similar to cloud security monitoring services. NetworkPolicies can be extended to include flow logging for monitoring network traffic. Additionally, configuring monitoring alerts in Kubernetes can be achieved through tools like Prometheus and Alertmanager.
title: Security Monitoring
